title: ilex centrochinensis
intro: Ilex centrochinensis, also known as Taiwan holly or Formosan holly, is a species of evergreen shrub or small tree native to Taiwan. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The plant's leaves and berries are used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, with potential health benefits including improved immune function and antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Ilex centrochinensis often include infusions of the leaves and berries, which can be consumed as teas or used in combination with other herbs to create tinctures and capsules.
